rankings.reason: Best alignment with the futuristic 2050 theme, incorporating creative technologies like teleportation and anti-gravity chambers.
Strong focus on passenger comfort and stress reduction, though the technology feels slightly less advanced than Option A.
Provides a clear, logical flow of the airport experience but lacks the imaginative flair of the top options.
Weakest narrative structure and fails to provide the requested catchy marketing slogans in the specified format.
